title: Crafted Premium
description: This Minecraft modpack takes the game to its best — from performance tweaks to quality-of-life features and resource packs, it has it all!
body:
![Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/372af5d70cf91f208b1ffa510267a0eddccf37de_0.webp)

This Minecraft mod pack takes Minecraft to its best. From performance to quality of life mods and resource packs, this modpack has it all.

- First-Person Model
- 3D Items
- Freecam
- Better Third Person
- Shader Support
- Performance Optimization
- Replay Mod
- Fresh Animations

NOTE: If you experiencee a bug with the double chest model, disable the resource pack "Fresh Animations - Extensions".

Fresh moves (personal preference) works great with this modpack, download at [https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/tras-fresh-player](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/tras-fresh-player)

Make your own Vanilla Tweaks Resource pack that ties in with this modpack greatly at [https://vanillatweaks.net/picker/resource-packs/](https://vanillatweaks.net/picker/resource-packs/)

License Info
This modpack includes mods with different licenses, mostly All Rights Reserved. I don’t own any of the included mods — all credit goes to their creators.

If a mod isn’t meant to be in a modpack, let me know and I’ll remove it.
